prestazioni: Upgrade the **CZDA 2.0L TSI EA888 Gen3B** engine with a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II** turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 52mm compressor inducer) paired with a **Forge Motorsport Motorsport Series intercooler** (bar-and-plate core, 100% CNC-machined end tanks) to support 400+ HP on **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with flex-fuel capability and **Bosch Motorsport 0280158802** high-flow injectors (1,200cc/min).

Install a **034 Motorsport Stage 2+ DSG TCU tune** with **South Bend Clutch DSG Stage 3 clutch pack** (ceramic friction material, 1,200 Nm torque capacity) and **AP Racing CP8396-750** twin-plate organic clutch for launch control optimization and 0.15s faster shifts under WOT conditions.

Replace the OEM **MQB-A2 platform** subframe with a **034 Motorsport Motorsport Subframe Collar Kit** (7075-T6 aluminum, 30% stiffer) and fit **KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers** (10-position rebound, 16-level compression, 20mm ride height adjustment) with **SuperPro 85mm adjustable front camber plates** and **H&R 25mm rear anti-roll bar** for Nürburgring lap-time reduction.
estetica: Fit a **Prior Design PD-KODRS widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, 30mm extended wheel arches) with **Rieger Tuning RS-spec front splitter** (3D-molded polyurethane, 45mm overhang) and **Maxton Design GT rear diffuser** (dual-layer carbon fiber, integrated tow hook cover).

Install **BBS CI-R 21x9.5 ET35** forged wheels (9J front, 10.5J rear) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (275/30 R21 front, 295/25 R21 rear) and **AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front calipers** (380mm two-piece rotors) with **Ferodo DS2500** pads for track-ready braking.

Apply **3M 1080 Gloss Black Vinyl Wrap** with **Vinyl Frog Hexis Carbon Fiber** accents (hood, roof, mirror caps) and **Morimoto XB LED headlights** (CCT-adjustable, 5,500K, 3,000-lumen output) with **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes** (RGBW, 16.7M colors, sequential startup animation).
